productName: Tasty Terps - TT BHO 1g - Gummy Bears - 1g
description: Classic hybrid BHO crafted from Gummy Bears — hydrocarbon-extracted, fully purged, and dense with cannabinoids for an efficient, hard-hitting dab. Potent, clean, and lab-tested — with notes of berry, strawberry, and sweet, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
